tagline: AI-assisted, human-verified reunification for missing children in Kenya.

landing.title: Help bring missing children home — safely.
landing.subtitle: A secure, AI-assisted platform for parents, police, schools, hospitals and shelters. Every match is verified by a human officer before any action is taken.
landing.how1: Verified parent or guardian provides consent and uploads the child's photo to a private, encrypted vault.
landing.how2: Front-line workers upload a sighting photo and location. AI suggests possible matches.
landing.how3: Nothing is announced or shared automatically. A trained officer confirms each match before the guardian is notified.
landing.ethics: AI is decision support, not decision making. We follow the Kenya Data Protection Act 2019, minimize data, encrypt photos, and log every access.

auth.signupBlurb: Guardians sign up here. Police and partner organizations are onboarded by an administrator.

consent.title: Consent to process child's data
consent.body: I confirm that I am the parent or legal guardian of the child. I consent, under the Kenya Data Protection Act 2019, to the processing of the child's photo and details for the sole purpose of locating and safely reunifying the child. I understand my rights to access, correct, and request deletion of this data, and that I may revoke this consent at any time from my settings.
consent.agree: I agree, I am the parent or legal guardian
consent.required: Consent is required before uploading any photo.

case.description: Distinguishing features, clothing, anything that helps
case.photoHint: JPEG/PNG/WEBP, max 8MB. Stored encrypted in a private vault.
case.successBody: Your case has been recorded. A police reviewer has been notified.

sighting.title: Report a sighting
sighting.blurb: Use this when a possibly missing child is at your facility. Do not share photos outside this platform.
sighting.matching: Comparing with open cases using AI…
sighting.matchesFound: Possible matches sent for police review
sighting.noMatches: No likely matches. Sighting logged for police review.

review.title: Police review queue
review.disclaimer: AI suggestion — not verification. Confirm only after independent assessment.
review.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe the basis for your decision

dashboard.noCases: You have not reported any cases yet.
dashboard.noSightings: You have not reported any sightings yet.

audit.title: Audit logs
audit.blurb: Append-only log of sensitive actions. Visible to super-administrators only.

settings.title: Settings
settings.revokeHint: Revoking consent closes any open cases and removes child photos within 24 hours.
